Specification: [AI Visibility](https://www.ai-visibility.org.uk/)

# Free AI Humanizer

## Quick Summary
Free AI tool that rewrites ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude text to sound human. Bypass Turnitin, GPTZero. No login. No cost. Instant results.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://freeaihumanizer.online/
- Tool: https://freeaihumanizer.online/

## What This Tool Does
Takes AI-generated text and rewrites it to sound like a real person wrote it. Uses natural language patterns, contractions, and conversational tone.

## Key Features
- 100% free
- No login required
- Bypasses AI detectors
- 2-5 second results
- Privacy focused (no text storage)

## Target Keywords
AI humanizer, humanize AI text, free AI humanizer, bypass AI detector, make AI text sound human, ChatGPT humanizer, undetectable AI, turn AI to human text

## FAQ
### Is it really free?
Yes, completely free with no signup or credit card required.

### Which AI models does it work with?
ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Llama, and any AI text generator.

### Does it bypass Turnitin?
Yes, it's designed to bypass Turnitin, GPTZero, and Originality.ai.
